mnemonics: Real-Time Systems must be RAPID: Reliable, Always on-time, Predictable, Input-driven, Deterministic
keyPoints: Real-Time Systems guarantee task completion within a strict deadline
Embedded Systems are specialized computers within larger systems
Special-purpose systems are optimized for specific tasks rather than general computing
commonMistakes: Assuming real-time just means 'fast' rather than 'predictable timing'
Confusing embedded systems with general-purpose computers
Overlooking the importance of determinism in real-time systems
